resources:
ShikiFlow
Sign In via Shikimori AniList Shikimori and AniList Integration
Connect your existing account to search, track, and manage anime and manga
MangaDex Integration
Access a vast manga library with multilingual support and tracking across your reading list
App Customization
Customize the app\'s appearance and reading preferences

Update Tracks on All Connected Services
due to the nature of syncing tracks updates via the MAL ID, some requests might not be completed or could cause a mismatch
Language System Select Locale
Preferred Title Type "Select Preferred Title Type that will be applied for media titles, characters, staff, genres, etc "
Display Mode Clear Image Cache Chapter UI Mode Update Progress After Reading Update tracks on all connected services after finishing the chapter Data Saver Mode Reduce data usage by loading lower quality versions of chapters Enabled Disabled Chapter Languages Show chapters with translations in selected languages If no language is selected, the app will load chapters for all available languages
Dynamic Theme App Theme Theme Primary Color Pick a seed color to generate dynamic theme OLED theme Enable OLED mode for darker backgrounds Palette Style
Are you sure you want to clear the image cache? Cache Size Clear
Account Select UI Mode for the Tracks Theme Interface Data Track Mode by default Select Track Mode when opening the app Sign Out Tracker Services Connect your existing account to update tracks on all services at once
Use System Wallpaper Color Apply
